message:
refactor(cloudflare,hue): add configurable timeouts, typed input validation, and integration tests

Cloudflare:
- Add configurable timeout field to CloudflareClient (was hardcoded 30s)
- Add optional_bool/u32/u16/string helpers for flexible input parsing
- Validate request_timeout_ms > 0, refactor auth credential trimming

Hue:
- Add SetLightStateInput and RecallSceneInput with from_value() factories
  and validation (brightness 0-100, non-empty IDs)
- Allow http://localhost and 127.0.0.1 for testing only
- Add doctor checks for app_key and transport protocol
- New integration test suite with wiremock, Ed25519 signing, capability tokens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -23,6 +23,8 @@ forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged", "network.listen"]
 
 # Hue bridges are local-network resources chosen at configuration time, so the
 # exact host allowlist is intentionally deferred to runtime configuration.
+# Production bridge access is expected to use HTTPS; plain HTTP is only used
+# for loopback test harnesses.
 
 [provides.operations.health]
 summary = "Report Hue bridge health and configuration"
@@ -81,4 +83,3 @@ cpu_percent = 25
 wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
 deny_exec = true
 deny_ptrace = true
-
